title: CRM Investigation Master Timeline
description: Chronological reconstruction of the criminal enterprise from SHIFT AI through CRM token - Complete forensic timeline

events.title: SHIFT AI 'Contest Winner' Pre-Positioning
events.description: AvZHExxq2 purchased 2.29M SHIFT 13 minutes BEFORE public announcement
events.significance: Kill shot evidence - No voting contract existed during 'contest'

events.title: Coordinated Pre-Positioning
events.description: Synchronized buys by operator wallets
events.significance: These wallets later received PBTC/EPIK rewards June 8, 2025

events.title: SHIFT AI 'Winner' Announcement
events.description: Public announcement of 'contest winner' - 13 minutes after insider purchase
events.significance: Winner was pre-selected, not voted on - No voting contract existed

events.title: Operator Rewards Distribution
events.description: PBTC/EPIK 'rewards' distributed to confirmed operator wallets
events.significance: Confirms coordinated operation, not random participants - Payroll evidence

events.title: Telegram Evidence Collection Period

events.title: CRM Token Launch
events.description: CRM launches on Raydium at $0.000191. Total supply: 999,917,025 (fixed, mintAuthority disabled)
events.significance: Genesis of token later infiltrated by SOSANA criminal enterprise

events.title: CRM Free Allocation - BKLBtcJQJ2
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 receives 36,675,895 CRM via free allocation (pre-launch positioning)
events.significance: Zero-cost acquisition - later used for Dec 8 mega-dump

events.title: Pre-Mega-Dump Liquidity Test
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes preliminary sell of 90,253 CRM for 0.100 SOL (~$9) - testing liquidity
events.significance: Pre-operation liquidity test before main manipulation

events.title: THE MEGA-DUMP: CRM Birth Suppression Event
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes largest single CRM sell: 41,089,529 CRM → 24.44 SOL (~$2,200). Original price suppression event preventing organic discovery.
events.significance: CRITICAL: Original price suppression - prevented CRM from ever running properly after launch

events.title: CRASH AND LOAD: Coordinated Reload at Suppressed Price
events.description: 67 minutes after BKLBtcJQJ2 mega-dump, HPVUJGJwJ receives 17.4M CRM via dust-fee transfers at artificially suppressed price. ARM A dumps → ARM B accumulates.
events.significance: Textbook wash trading - coordinated dump and reload by same operator

events.title: Post-Dump Cleanup
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes final cleanup sell of 12,280 CRM following Dec 8 mega-dump
events.significance: Final extraction from wallet before abandoning

events.title: Circular Consolidation Operations
events.description: D9ZGRMhmdM executes circular transfers to ARu4n5mFdZog + HLnpSz9h - internal network rebalancing
events.significance: Evidence of coordinated network rebalancing

events.title: CRM Loading Phase Begins - HLnpSz9h → 8eVZa7
events.description: HLnpSz9h (THE FEEDER) begins 4-day mechanized loading of 8eVZa7 with 20M+ CRM via 30+ dust-fee transfers. Zero cost basis established for March extraction.
events.transfer_method: 30+ batch transfers at 0.002 SOL dust fees
events.significance: MANIPULATION PHASE: Establishes zero-cost positions for March 2026 extraction

events.title: Loading Complete + Downstream Distribution
events.description: HLnpSz9h completes loading 8eVZa7 with ~20M CRM. Same day, 8eVZa7 loads 7abBmGf4 with 20M CRM.
events.significance: Victim wallet loaded by criminal infrastructure + Satellite distribution

events.title: Staging Operation - CNSob1L Simultaneous Send
events.description: CNSob1LwXvDRmjioxyjm78tDb2S7nzFK6K8t3VmuhKpn sends 1,998,750 CRM simultaneously to ARu4n5mFdZog + HLnpSz9h
events.significance: Simultaneous send to dump infrastructure - staging operation

events.title: MILITARY-SCALE AUTOMATION DEPLOYED - CRITICAL EVIDENCE

events.significance: KILL SHOT EVIDENCE - Military-grade automation proves organized criminal infrastructure
